info.title: Plug Agente Socket RPC
info.description: OpenRPC document for the Plug JSON-RPC profile over Socket.IO. Application events are transported only inside PayloadFrame envelopes after agent:capabilities negotiation; requests sent earlier are rejected with invalid_request / protocol_not_ready. The logical RPC payload inside the frame remains JSON UTF-8, with gzip/none negotiated at the transport layer; the current runtime does not negotiate a separate binary codec such as MessagePack. After negotiation the agent may emit optional agent:ready for hubs that use explicit readiness when extensions.protocolReadyAck is negotiated. sql.execute results include effective_max_rows when applicable, and managed pagination requires an explicit ORDER BY for both page/page_size and cursor flows; generated SQL shape still depends on DB dialect (SQL Server OFFSET/FETCH, SQL Anywhere TOP/START AT, PostgreSQL LIMIT/OFFSET). Agent capabilities may also advertise recommendedStreamPullWindowSize / maxStreamPullWindowSize to guide rpc:stream.pull sizing. From profile 2.6, the agent may publish registration metadata in agent:register.profile and exposes method agent.getProfile for centralized registration flows; this method also accepts the same client_token aliases used by authorized SQL methods when agent-side authorization is enabled. Profile 2.7 adds client_token.getPolicy to return the resolved authorization policy for the presented client token (same resolution path as SQL authorization). Profile 2.8 extends getPolicy with optional token metadata (token_id, issued_at, updated_at), payload redaction for RPC (allowlist for safe token_* metadata keys), per-scope rate limiting (CLIENT_TOKEN_GET_POLICY_MAX_PER_MINUTE, CLIENT_TOKEN_GET_POLICY_MAX_SCOPE_KEYS), rate-limit errors with retry_after_ms/reset_at in error.data, feature flag enableClientTokenPolicyIntrospection (also in desktop settings), and dispatch metrics including failure-by-Failure-kind counters. See docs/communication/socket_communication_standard.md.

servers.name: socketio-hub
servers.summary: Logical Socket.IO transport negotiated during agent registration

methods.name: sql.execute
methods.summary: Execute a SQL statement, optionally returning multiple result sets

methods.name: sql.executeBatch
methods.summary: Execute multiple SQL statements in a batch with optional per-command execution order

methods.name: sql.cancel
methods.summary: Cancel an in-flight streaming SQL execution

methods.name: agent.getProfile
methods.summary: Return the current agent registration/profile data available in local configuration

methods.name: client_token.getPolicy
methods.summary: Return the resolved client token policy (permissions and metadata) for the presented token

methods.name: rpc.discover
methods.summary: Return the published OpenRPC contract for the active Plug profile
